verses.text: Zing ciang hun-a ding kima-sialh kei in. Tuhun leh tua hun kikalah a piang ding thu bangmah na thei kei hi
Midangte in hong phat lohbuang nangmah kiphattawm kei in. Khual mite in hong phat lohbuang nangma kamin kiphattawm kei in
Suangtum leh sehnel gik mahmah a, ahi zongin mihaite' pian'sak lungkhamna gikzaw lai hi
Hehna leh sinsona siahuai a, ahi zongin hazatna siahuaizaw lai hi
Itna i seel bawl sangin a langtangin taina hoihzaw hi
I lawmte in hong liamsak hangin i hoihna ding a hong deihsakna hizaw hi. I galte in hong ngawng kawina pen hong lehbawlna ahi hi
A gilvah mipa in khuaizu nangawn duh nawnlo a, a gilkial mipa in a kha an nangawn limsa hi
Inn panin gamlapi-ah a zinkhia mipa a bu panin a lengkhia vasa tawh kibang hi
Sathau namtui leh paknamtui in lung nuamsak a, lawmte' limbawlna in tha hatsak hi
Na lawmte daangkoih kei in la, na pa' lawmte dong nangawn lawm bawl in. Na lungkham ciangin na sanggampa va ko kei in. A gamla-ah a om i sanggampa sangin a nai-ah a om i vengpa kimangzaw hi
Ka ta aw, pil in; tua hi leh ka lungdam ding a, kei hong mawhsak nuamte in bangmah hong cih theilo ding hi
Mipilte in a lauhuai thu muthei-in pelh uh a, mi mawkmawkte in phusuakin thuak uh hi
Mi khat in gamdang mi khat' leiba a lohsak dingin kam a ciam leh a ciam bangin ama neihsa kilaksak takpi ding hi
Mi khat in a kituak lopi-in midang khat limbawl lualiang leh amah in a sia lamin na ngaihsun zaw hi
Phun bekbek a thei zi pen theu hun mel a neilo guahciin tawh kibang hi
Tua bang numeite kikho theilo a, a kikham theilo huihnung, leh i khutin sathau i tawi nop tawh kibang hi
Sik in sik mah hiamsak thei a, mi in midang pilsak thei hi
Theikung a cingpa in a theigah ne a, a tapa a kempa in pahtakna ngah hi
Tui sung en leeng eima maitang i muh bangin i lungsim en leeng eima pian'zia kilang hi
Mihingte' lungsim pen misite' gam tawh kibang a, tamlua cih hun nei theilo hi
Ngun leh khamte meikhukah kize-et a, mihing ahih leh phatna tawh kize-et hi
Mihai khat a sih dek dongin na satsat hangin a hai ngei mahin hai veve lai ding hi
Na tuuhonte hoihtakin thei in la, na bawnghonte hoihtakin kem in
Bang hang hiam cih leh neihsa kip tawntunglo a, hauhna pen a khangkhangin kizom suaklo hi
Lopate ki-atmang khin a, ahi zongin a no hong selkik hi. Mualtungah a po lopa hing khempeuh ki-atin inn-ah kipua a
tuute in na puan ding hong guan' a, na keeltal mante lo ciing khat man tawh kikim hi
Na keelnawite ahih leh na innkuan annek ding, leh na nasem numeite' nuntakna dingin kicing ding hi.
